WHIMS HOLO·SCAN
idle
WISE HOMEOPATHY

HOLO·SCAN

Point at bottle caps — names float over every code automatically. Search a code to locate a bottle on the shelf. Load any Excel list to scan a different inventory.

ADD MEDICINE

Saved on this phone and scannable immediately.
Print at 100% scale — label is 1 cm. Scannable from screen too.

LOAD EXCEL LIST

Pick any .xlsx/.csv with a code column and a name column (potency & pack optional — header names are auto-detected). Choose whether it replaces or merges with the current list. Stored on this phone.

GOOGLE SHEET SYNC

Publish your sheet (File → Share → Publish to web → CSV), paste the link once, and every phone stays in sync. Columns auto-detected like Excel import.
